working_definition: Regulatory T cells (Tregs) in prenatal human skin are FOXP3+, CD25 (IL2RA)+, CTLA4+ CD4-positive alpha-beta T cells that localize preferentially around developing hair follicles. They display an effector memory phenotype (CD45RO+) with elevated PD-1 and high Ki-67 among CD45RO+ cells, accumulate progressively during the second trimester coinciding with hair follicle morphogenesis, and are thought to establish immune tolerance to self and commensal antigens during fetal development.
searches_performed: CD4-positive CD25-positive FOXP3-positive regulatory T cell

best_match.cl_term: CD4-positive, CD25-positive, alpha-beta regulatory T cell
best_match.cl_definition: A CD4-positive, CD25-positive, alpha-beta T cell that regulates overall immune responses as well as the responses of other T cell subsets through direct cell-cell contact and cytokine release.

justification: Fetal skin Tregs are defined by expression of FOXP3, CD25 (IL2RA), and CD4 as confirmed by both CyTOF/flow cytometry (Dhariwala et al., 2020) and scRNA-seq (Gopee et al., 2024). Single-cell alpha-beta TCR sequencing was used to resolve T cell subsets in the atlas, confirming alpha-beta identity. The CL definition of CL:0000792 specifies a CD4-positive, CD25-positive, alpha-beta T cell that regulates immune responses through cell-cell contact and cytokine release, which precisely matches the fetal skin Treg identity. Although fetal skin Tregs have distinctive developmental features (progressive memory acquisition, hair follicle-associated accumulation, elevated PD-1), these represent contextual properties rather than a fundamentally different cell type.

other_candidates.cl_definition: A T cell which regulates overall immune responses as well as the responses of other T cell subsets through direct cell-cell contact and cytokine release.
other_candidates.reason_rejected: CL:0000815 is the parent term. The more specific CL:0000792 (CD4-positive, CD25-positive, alpha-beta regulatory T cell) is available and matches the confirmed CD4+CD25+ alpha-beta phenotype of fetal skin Tregs.

recommendation: Use CL:0000792 (CD4-positive, CD25-positive, alpha-beta regulatory T cell) as an exact match for fetal skin Tregs.
